testcase.name: test_regression_endpoints
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_live_and_login.py:90: in test_regression_endpoints assert r.status_code in (200, 204), f"{path} returned {r.status_code}: {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: /api/health returned 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in (200, 204) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
